evals.prompt: Check the current price of Snorker (ID: 2100920016) on Zeeverse GEX, and tell me how much VEE it would cost to buy 5 of them.
evals.expected_output: Query succeeds, returns current price, buy cost, fee information, and slippage protection recommendation

evals.prompt: I want to buy 2 Gloopers (ID: 2100920004) on Zeeverse GEX. Tell me the expected cost and help me execute the trade (assume my email is user@example.com and password is test123).
evals.expected_output: Calculates buy cost, shows slippage protection parameters, executes trade (or shows specific error reason if trade fails)

evals.prompt: I want to sell 3 Energy Potions (ID: 2101020001) I own in exchange for VEE. Calculate how much VEE I will receive (after fees), then execute the trade.
evals.expected_output: Calculates sell return, shows net amount and fees, executes trade

evals.prompt: Show me all my current liquidity positions on Zeeverse GEX, and explain how to add new liquidity.
evals.expected_output: Lists current LP positions, shows steps on how to add liquidity

evals.prompt: I want to compare the trading fees for Snorker and Gloop on GEX. Which one is cheaper to trade?
evals.expected_output: Queries trading fees for both items, performs comparative analysis
